title: Assistant district attorney
doc_html:
§843.  Assistant district attorney

The office of assistant district attorney for the Thirty-Fifth Judicial District of Louisiana is created.  

Added by Acts 1977, No. 22, §2.
doc_text:
§843.  Assistant district attorney
The office of assistant district attorney for the Thirty-Fifth Judicial District of Louisiana is created.
Added by Acts 1977, No. 22, §2.
